zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Musgrave於1198年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫時，他的父親Sir Adam de Musgrave28歲，母親Alicia de Holebec24歲。他於大約1225年與Isabella在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1269年在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Musgrave于1198年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫时，他的父亲Sir Adam de Musgrave28岁，母亲Alicia de Holebec24岁。他于大约1225年与Isabella在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1269年在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Musgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Musgrove
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Musgrave in Cumbria. The placename derives from Old English mūs ‘mouse’ + grāf ‘copse, grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Musgrave was born in 1198, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Adam de Musgrave, was 28 and his mother, Alicia de Holebec, was 24. He married Isabella about 1225, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1269, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Musgrave est né en 1198, à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam de Musgrave, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Holebec, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabella environ 1225, à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1269, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

Er hat um 1225 in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Isabella geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1269 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Musgraveが1198年にイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブで生まれた時，父Sir Adam de Musgraveは28歳，母Alicia de Holebecは24歳であった。約1225年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブでIsabellaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1269年に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Musgrave(이)가 1198년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam de Musgrave(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia de Holebec(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 Isabella(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1269년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Musgrave родился в 1198 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam de Musgrave было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Holebec, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella около 1225 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1269 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.
